meta.title: Russia tried to sell a SUBMARINE to a Colombian cartel
meta.description:
In 1980, a Russian man named Ludwig Fainberg arrived in Miami with his sights set on the American dream... or at least, a certain type of it. Fainberg, known to most as "Tarzan," would work his way into the organized crime underbelly of Miami, culminating in an insane plan to secure a Foxtrot-Class Soviet submarine for a Colombian drug cartel. 

Here's how it all played out. 

Read our written coverage on Sandboxx News:
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/featured/how-colombias-drug-cartels-almost-bought-a-soviet-submarine/
